post.subject: Foxhero Fortunes | What's Your Wish Today...?
post.content: The "Foxhero Prayers" is an ancient tradition of the Xianzhou Yaoqing. This folk tradition can be traced back to 80 Amber Eras ago. But as to what does the Foxhero looks like... There is no consensus. However, the Foxhero on the fortune slip these days is looking more and more like Feixiao, the Vanquishing General. And thus, a rumor slowly emerged: Just say to yourself "Please, Vanquishing General!" whenever you desire something, then you'd receive Feixiao's blessings and your wish would come true. However, a rumor is just a rumor, no more and no less. You should try it yourself to determine whether the rumor is true.

post.subject: Travel Encounters | Skysplitter
post.content: The Luminary Wardance is about to begin. Welcome to the grand venue — The Skysplitter, floating high above the Xianzhou Luofu's delves! Having valiantly served as a fighter jet during the Third Denizens of Abundance War, the Skysplitter bears a wealth of victorious memories and countless battle scars. After its retirement, skilled craftsmen from the Artisanship Commission meticulously removed its battle armor, unveiling a refreshed exterior to welcome visitors. Curious about how the Skysplitter looks, now that it has transformed into today's Wardance venue? Join me on a tour!

post.subject: Myriad Celestia Trailer: The Arrow that Seeks the Stars | Honkai: Star Rail
post.content: Those with no tail, no life, and nine-fated deaths are without any choice but to push forward. Forward, beyond the grip of death, into the embrace of new life. Forward, for the stars light the path and nourish hope. Those who are entangled by twin veins of clashing fate, fated to battle without end, without any hope of respite. One vein is bestowed of wisdom, decisive like falling lightning. Another vein is fueled of fury, capable of rivaling an army of ten-thousand foes. She is an arrow of the Reignbow — with one arrow pointed at her prey, and another pointed at herself.
